    static void
    updateAdmissionStatuses(Map<String, CoreCaseData> coreCaseDataAll)
    Updates the status of each CoreCaseData according to the rule: - RE_ADMISSION if the most recent previous case for the same patient has a discharge date within 182 days (inclusive) before the current admission date.
    static void
    updateConditionEncounterReferences(List<MiiCondition> conditions, String oldEncounterId, String newEncounterId)
    Updates the encounter references for conditions of the cases that get merged.
    static void
    updateIntensiveCareDays(Map<String, CoreCaseData> coreCaseDataAll, List<MiiProcedure> procedures)
    Updates ICU day information on CoreCaseData records using performed dates from procedures.
    static void
    updateProcedureEncounterReferences(List<MiiProcedure> procedures, String oldEncounterId, String newEncounterId)
    Updates the encounter references for procedures of the cases that get merged.

  • Method Details

    • mergeEncounterAndFilterByAge

      public static KiraHandlingLogic.MergeResult mergeEncounterAndFilterByAge(List<MiiEncounter> facilityContactEncountersPreFiltered, List<MiiCondition> conditionsFiltered, List<MiiProcedure> proceduresFiltered, List<MiiPatient> patientsFiltered, InputCodeSettings inputCodeSettings)

    • mergeCoreCaseDataLists

      public static Map<String, CoreCaseData> mergeCoreCaseDataLists(Map<String, Map<String, CoreCaseData>> coreCaseDataByKjpDiagnosis, Map<String, Map<String, CoreCaseData>> coreCaseDataByRsvDiagnosis)

    • mergeCoreCaseDataList

      public static Map<String, CoreCaseData> mergeCoreCaseDataList(Map<String, Map<String, CoreCaseData>> coreCaseData)

    • mergeCases

      public static void mergeCases(List<MiiCondition> conditions, List<MiiProcedure> procedures, List<MiiEncounter> facilityEncounters, List<Map.Entry<String, CoreCaseData>> caseDataEntries, Set<String> casesDeletedByDiagnosis, Map<String, CoreCaseData> coreCaseDataByEncounterIdMap)
      Merges multiple cases for a single patient.
      Parameters:
      conditions - Condition resources where the references may need to be updated.
      procedures - Procedure resources where the references may need to be updated.
      facilityEncounters - Facility encounters where the update procedure should take part.
      caseDataEntries - List of case data entries for a single patient.
      casesDeletedByDiagnosis - Set of IDs of cases that have been merged.
      coreCaseDataByEncounterIdMap - Map of encounter IDs to CoreCaseData.

    • updateConditionEncounterReferences

      public static void updateConditionEncounterReferences(List<MiiCondition> conditions, String oldEncounterId, String newEncounterId)
      Updates the encounter references for conditions of the cases that get merged.
      Parameters:
      oldEncounterId - the old encounter ID to be replaced, must not be null
      newEncounterId - the new encounter ID to replace with, must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if either oldEncounterId or newEncounterId is null

    • updateProcedureEncounterReferences

      public static void updateProcedureEncounterReferences(List<MiiProcedure> procedures, String oldEncounterId, String newEncounterId)
      Updates the encounter references for procedures of the cases that get merged.
      Parameters:
      procedures - the list of procedures to update; may be empty but not null-safe if method is called with null
      oldEncounterId - the old encounter ID to be replaced, must not be null
      newEncounterId - the new encounter ID to replace with, must not be null

    • processDiagnosisType

      public static void processDiagnosisType(Map<String, Map<String, CoreCaseData>> result, Map<String, CoreCaseData> registry, List<MiiCondition> conditions, List<MiiEncounter> facilityContactEncountersFiltered, FacilityContactIcuLocationMap facilityContactIcuLocationMap, List<MiiPatient> patientsFiltered, Map<String, List<String>> icdCodesByDiag)

    • mapEncountersToPatients

      public static Map<MiiEncounter, MiiPatient> mapEncountersToPatients(Set<MiiEncounter> encounters, List<MiiPatient> patients)
      Maps encounters to corresponding patients.
      Parameters:
      encounters - The set of encounters.
      patients - The list of patients.
      Returns:
      A map of encounters to patients.

    • addCaseDataIfAbsent

      public static void addCaseDataIfAbsent(Map<String, CoreCaseData> result, MiiEncounter encounter, List<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Encounter.EncounterLocationComponent> icuLocations, MiiPatient patient)
      Populates case data with admission details if not already present in the result map.
      Parameters:
      result - The map to store CoreCaseData, keyed by encounter ID.
      encounter - The encounter associated with the case.
      patient - The patient associated with the encounter.

    • createCasesByDiag

      public static Map<String, Map<String, CoreCaseData>> createCasesByDiag(List<MiiCondition> conditions, List<MiiEncounter> facilityContactEncountersFiltered, FacilityContactIcuLocationMap facilityContactIcuLocationMap, List<MiiPatient> patientsFiltered, Map<String, List<String>> icdCodeMap)

    • createCasesByDiag

      public static Map<String, Map<String, CoreCaseData>> createCasesByDiag(List<MiiCondition> conditions, List<MiiEncounter> facilityContactEncountersFiltered, FacilityContactIcuLocationMap facilityContactIcuLocationMap, List<MiiPatient> patientsFiltered, Map<String, List<String>> icdCodeMap, Map<String, CoreCaseData> registryByEncounterId)

    • updateAdmissionStatuses

      public static void updateAdmissionStatuses(Map<String, CoreCaseData> coreCaseDataAll)
      Updates the status of each CoreCaseData according to the rule: - RE_ADMISSION if the most recent previous case for the same patient has a discharge date within 182 days (inclusive) before the current admission date.

    • updateIntensiveCareDays

      public static void updateIntensiveCareDays(Map<String, CoreCaseData> coreCaseDataAll, List<MiiProcedure> procedures)
      Updates ICU day information on CoreCaseData records using performed dates from procedures.
      Parameters:
      coreCaseDataAll - container of all case-data entries keyed by (any) id; values are updated in place
      procedures - list of procedures contributing ICU day dates; may be empty
